text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we stroll through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I detect a dense crowd of people eighteen meters
and fifty-four centimeters ahead of us. It appears
to be...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation and a deluxe carrot
hamburger steak... I see.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I am currently on a mission to seek an
appropriate gift for you to show you my
"gratitude."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is only natural. However, the task is proving
much harder than predicted...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The issue is that a gift's appeal is directly
correlated to its price, and my finances are
unfortunately limited as a student.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I believe that a prize from this raffle
could supply me with a sufficient gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon stares at a poster that has all
the raffle's rules and regulations written on it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reviewing raffle procedures. First, I must obtain a
raffle ticket via a purchase... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you in current need of daily
necessities such as a toothbrush, socks, or
perhaps a handkerchief?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to be selfish, I tell her to go out and
buy something for herself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have successfully acquired a raffle ticket via
purchase of protein powder. Proceeding to phase
two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She gives the tumbler's handle a powerful spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete. Hot spring vacation coupon
obtained.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Despite being fully cognizant of the possibility of
winning the grand prize, I am still experiencing
"amazement" over this result.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I cannot fully believe that I won...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, here is your gift. I thank you
now and always, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...? Of course. This mission's objective was to gift
you with this vacation coupon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please use it to refresh your body and mind in the
hot spring.
choice_data_list: But you were the one who won it...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Confusion" detected in Trainer. Searching for
possible solutions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One result found. The coupon is for two, so I will
accompany you to the destination as your
luggage bearer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I will search for relaxation methods
and plan the most effective hot spring vacation
itinerary for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, immediate implementation of this
plan is impossible, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is that acceptable?
choice_data_list: I-I can't make you do all that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel horrible making her do so much work, but
I suppose it's better than if she didn't use the
ticket for herself at all.
choice_data_list:
Let's think about it once your race schedule has
calmed down.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not sure how we should use the coupon,
but I decide to hold on to it for now.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete. First prize obtained.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It may not be as grand as a vacation coupon, but
this prize boasts exceptionally high nutritional
value.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please take this. Thank you for all you have done
for me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is very kind of you, but...
choice_data_list: It'll be tastier if we split it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I cannot comprehend the logic behind that
statement, but if that is an order, then I accept.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the deluxe carrot hamburger steak
together after we get back!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Results of raffle—second prize. This is not an
unsatisfactory outcome, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, Trainer. I will use these carrots for
meal preparation—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon fixes her eyes on the large pile
of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I've been struck by "inspiration."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
With such a large amount of carrots, it will be
possible to create new dishes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I can complete my mission by
creating a gift from these!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching for recipes... Results returned for
multiple recipes, including dishes from braised
burdock root and namul, to cookies and cakes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Please be in your office at 6:00 p.m., Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night in my office, she treats me to a feast
featuring a huge variety of delicious carrot dishes!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A single carrot...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My sincerest apologies, Trainer. Please allow me
to show you my appreciation at a later date.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stops mid-sentence and looks up as if
something's caught her eye.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A bag of potatoes is one hundred and fifty yen...
And one onion is forty yen!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, may I stop by your room at around 6:00
p.m. tonight?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. Please maintain a state of
hunger until then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, Mihono Bourbon visits me with a
container full of delicious curry.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission failed... I am terribly sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please allow me to express my thanks at a later
date.
choice_data_list:
It's all right! You've expressed yourself plenty
already.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Even so, I'm experiencing "disappointment."

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so hard on yourself, young lady! There's
always next time!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head home with Mihono Bourbon. Her shoulders
are slumped in defeat the whole way back.
